/usr/bin/cc -fsanitize=address -g -O0 -fsanitize=address -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/chaos_server.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/chaos_server.dir/runtime/ce_server_main.c.o -o ../bin/chaos_server  -Wl,-rpath,/home/zhongfangdao/chaos-engine/third_party/lua/lib ../lib/libengine_core.a ../lib/libengine_server.a ../lib/libengine_admin_ipc.a ../lib/libengine_sync.a ../lib/libengine_dbproxy.a ../lib/libengine_save.a ../lib/libengine_admin_ipc.a ../lib/libengine_server.a ../lib/libengine_core.a -lm -ldl /home/zhongfangdao/chaos-engine/third_party/lua/lib/liblua5.4.so -lbpf -luring -lpthread
